de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.joinrule

Class JoinPartnerSelectionDialog

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • java.awt.Window
          • java.awt.Dialog
            • javax.swing.JDialog
              • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.joinrule.JoinPartnerSelectionDialog
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ImageObserver, MenuContainer, Serializable, Accessible, RootPaneContainer, WindowConstants

    public class JoinPartnerSelectionDialog
extends JDialog
    JDialog for selecting a subset of candidate goals as partners for a join rule application.
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Enables / disables the OK and Choose all button depending on whether or not the currently chosen join rule instance is applicable.

      Loads the join candidates into the combo box, initializes the partner editor pane with the text of the first candidate.

    • Constructor Detail

      • JoinPartnerSelectionDialog

        private JoinPartnerSelectionDialog()

      • JoinPartnerSelectionDialog

        public JoinPartnerSelectionDialog(Goal joinGoal,
                          PosInOccurrence pio,
                          ImmutableList<Triple<Goal,PosInOccurrence,HashMap<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable>>> candidates,
                          Services services)
        Creates a new join partner selection dialog.
        Parameters:
        joinGoal - The first (already chosen) join partner.
        pio - Position of Update-Modality-Postcondition formula in the joinNode.
        candidates - Potential join candidates.
        services - The services object.

    • Method Detail

      • main

        public static void main(String[] args)

      • getChosenCandidates

        public ImmutableList<Triple<Goal,PosInOccurrence,HashMap<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable>>> getChosenCandidates()
        Returns:
        All chosen join partners.

      • getChosenJoinRule

        public JoinProcedure getChosenJoinRule()
        Returns:
        The chosen join rule.

      • getChosenDistinguishingFormula

        public Term getChosenDistinguishingFormula()
        Returns:
        The chosen distinguishing formula. If null, an automatic generation of the distinguishing formula should be performed.

      • isApplicableForCandidates

        private boolean isApplicableForCandidates(ImmutableList<Triple<Goal,PosInOccurrence,HashMap<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable>>> theCandidates)
        Checks whether the join rule is applicable for the given set of candidates.
        Parameters:
        theCandidates - Candidates to instantiate the join rule application with.
        Returns:
        true iff the join rule instance induced by the given set of candidates is applicable.

      • checkApplicable

        private void checkApplicable()
        Enables / disables the OK and Choose all button depending on whether or not the currently chosen join rule instance is applicable.

      • isSuitableDistFormula

        private boolean isSuitableDistFormula()
        Checks whether the selected distinguishable formula is actually suitable for this purpose.
        Returns:
        true iff the chosen "distinguishing formula" is a distinguishing formula.

      • checkProvability

        private static boolean checkProvability(Sequent seq,
                       Term formulaToProve,
                       Services services)
        Checks whether the given formula can be proven within the given sequent.
        Parameters:
        seq - Sequent in which to check the provability of formulaToProve.
        formulaToProve - Formula to prove.
        Returns:
        True iff formulaToProve can be proven within the given sequent.

      • immutableListFromIterabe

        private <T> ImmutableList<T> immutableListFromIterabe(Iterable<T> it)
        Parameters:
        it - Iterable to convert into an ImmutableList.
        Returns:
        An ImmutableList consisting of the elements in it.

      • getSelectedCandidate

        private Triple<Goal,PosInOccurrence,HashMap<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable>> getSelectedCandidate()
        Returns:
        The candidate chosen at the moment (by the combo box).

      • getNthCandidate

        private Triple<Goal,PosInOccurrence,HashMap<ProgramVariable,ProgramVariable>> getNthCandidate(int n)
        Returns the n-th candidate in the list.
        Parameters:
        n - Index of the join candidate.
        Returns:
        The n-th candidate in the list.

      • loadCandidates

        private void loadCandidates()
        Loads the join candidates into the combo box, initializes the partner editor pane with the text of the first candidate.

      • setHighlightedSequentForArea

        private void setHighlightedSequentForArea(Goal goal,
                                PosInOccurrence pio,
                                JEditorPane area)
        Adds the given goal to the given editor pane, with the portion that corresponds to the given position highlighted in bold.
        Parameters:
        goal - Goal to add.
        pio - Position indicating subterm to highlight.
        area - The editor pane to add the highlighted goal to.
